title: Qatar

jokes.text: Human trafficking... import-export. My sympathies.
jokes.setup: Selina offers condolences for someone's death and work they did together
jokes.punchline: The work was human trafficking, which she euphemistically corrects to 'import-export'
jokes.explanation: Perfect character moment showing Selina's moral flexibility and political instinct to sanitize awful truths. The quick correction is expertly timed.

jokes.text: It's like six degrees of Al-Qaeda in here.
jokes.setup: Looking around at various Middle Eastern dignitaries
jokes.punchline: References the 'six degrees of separation' game but with terrorists
jokes.explanation: Clever wordplay that captures the uncomfortable political reality of the diplomatic event.

jokes.text: I hope we don't drone this place while we're in it.
jokes.setup: Worry about being at event with potential terrorists
jokes.punchline: Fear that their own government might attack the building
jokes.explanation: Dark humor about US drone policy with perfect Gary-level anxiety and obliviousness.

jokes.text: He's dressed like a doorman.
jokes.setup: Told she can't take a photo with a Sudanese warlord
jokes.punchline: She focuses on his outfit rather than his war crimes
jokes.explanation: Classic Selina - missing the moral point entirely and focusing on superficial details.

jokes.text: He just went full Chinaman on me.
jokes.setup: Chinese President Lu pretends not to speak English
jokes.punchline: Selina uses outdated, offensive terminology
jokes.explanation: Perfectly captures Selina's casual insensitivity and political incorrectness.

jokes.text: I didn't recognize you with your little hat.
jokes.punchline: Patronizing comment about traditional headwear
jokes.explanation: More casual cultural insensitivity showing Selina's complete diplomatic ineptitude.

jokes.text: Oh, well, I have a dozen uncles. One less, more for the rest, right?
jokes.setup: Selina offers condolences for his uncle's death
jokes.punchline: He treats family death as an inheritance math problem
jokes.explanation: Brilliantly dark and unexpected response that subverts typical condolence expectations.

jokes.text: Oh, yeah, well, tell it to that ingrate, the Dalai Lama. I guess he'll be thanking me in his next life.
jokes.setup: Being offered sympathy about Tibet situation
jokes.punchline: Calls the Dalai Lama an ingrate and makes reincarnation joke
jokes.explanation: Exceptional Selina moment - blaming the Dalai Lama while making a Buddhist reincarnation reference shows her complete lack of self-awareness.

jokes.text: No, do I shake his hand? ... No, better not.
jokes.setup: Meeting Pakistani official and asking about protocol
jokes.punchline: Gary advises against handshake for unclear cultural/political reasons
jokes.explanation: Shows the awkward cultural navigation and Selina's complete dependence on Gary for basic diplomatic protocol.

jokes.text: Everyone say goat cheese!
jokes.setup: Taking a photo with Pakistani officials
jokes.punchline: Says 'goat cheese' instead of 'cheese' - culturally inappropriate but innocent
jokes.explanation: Subtle cultural insensitivity - goats being associated with the region while she remains oblivious.

jokes.text: Okay, Catherine, I think there's something wrong with your microphone, honey, because your voice sounds very whiny.
jokes.punchline: Selina immediately insults her daughter's voice
jokes.explanation: Perfect mother-daughter dynamic showing Selina's inability to be supportive even when trying.

jokes.text: Like Catherine's eyes.
jokes.setup: Gary says the connection is crystal clear
jokes.punchline: Richard adds awkward compliment about Catherine's eyes
jokes.explanation: Classic Richard - inappropriate timing with weirdly specific compliment.

jokes.text: Oh, fuck! ... Oh, how could this happen?!
jokes.punchline: Selina's horrified reaction to becoming a grandmother
jokes.explanation: Perfect Selina reaction - treating joyful news as personal catastrophe.

jokes.text: Maybe I can stop masturbating now.
jokes.punchline: Richard's completely inappropriate response
jokes.explanation: Peak Richard inappropriateness - somehow connecting pregnancy news to his personal habits.

jokes.text: He is a bomber and a photobomber!
jokes.setup: Explaining the warlord bombed his own people
jokes.punchline: Adding that he photobombed Selina too
jokes.explanation: Brilliant wordplay that perfectly captures the absurd juxtaposition of war crimes and social media culture.

jokes.text: That is not true. You have amazing calves.
jokes.setup: Selina says her international reputation is all she has left
jokes.punchline: Gary offers her calves as consolation
jokes.explanation: Perfect Gary loyalty - trying to comfort with completely irrelevant compliment.

jokes.text: A peace lady? ... Yes, thank you very much, Richard! Richard is thinking.
jokes.setup: Selina asks what's the opposite of a warlord
jokes.punchline: Richard says 'peace lady' and Selina praises this obvious answer
jokes.explanation: Shows Selina's desperation and Richard's simple-minded approach being treated as genius.

jokes.text: Oh, she was born with no legs. ... How can I even do a walk and talk?
jokes.punchline: Selina immediately concerned about photo logistics, not the disability
jokes.explanation: Perfectly captures Selina's shallow priorities - worried about optics rather than showing genuine concern.

jokes.text: I can't be with somebody who's physically disfigured. I know you can't. It makes me feel sick, okay?
jokes.setup: Continuing about activist with no legs
jokes.punchline: Selina admits her complete inability to handle disability
jokes.explanation: Brutal honesty about Selina's superficiality, with Gary's enabling agreement making it worse.

jokes.text: Oh, never mind. She was executed.
jokes.punchline: Casually mentioning she's dead
jokes.explanation: Dark humor delivered matter-of-factly, showing the grim reality of activism in oppressive regimes.

jokes.text: Full quota of limbs. She's got a whole face.
jokes.setup: Finding activist who meets their shallow requirements
jokes.punchline: Describing basic human anatomy as selling points
jokes.explanation: Brilliant absurdist humor reducing human dignity to a checklist of intact body parts.

jokes.text: Ugh, God! Well, that's not gonna be on camera, so.
jokes.punchline: Only concerned if it will affect the photo opportunity
jokes.explanation: Peak Selina callousness - dismissing serious human rights abuse because it won't show in photos.

jokes.text: One time, my mom brought in my breakfast an hour late like an idiot, so I just threw it on the floor and I said, 'Mom, if I wanted to eat this, I would've eaten it an hour ago.'
jokes.setup: Discussing being messed up by daylight saving time
jokes.punchline: Revealing awful treatment of his mother over trivial timing
jokes.explanation: Perfect Jonah entitlement and pettiness, treating his mother terribly over nothing.

jokes.text: I ended up having to poop in a Sunoco bathroom.
jokes.setup: Explaining how the breakfast incident threw off his schedule
jokes.punchline: The ultimate consequence was using a gas station bathroom
jokes.explanation: Shows Jonah's privileged disgust at normal-people experiences.

jokes.text: No, it sounds like a gay a cappella group.
jokes.setup: Jonah suggests 'Libertonians' as their group name
jokes.punchline: Kent's matter-of-fact assessment
jokes.explanation: Perfect Kent delivery - brutally accurate assessment delivered without emotion.

jokes.text: Hamilton wasn't a president. ... Then why the fuck did they write a musical about him?!
jokes.setup: Kent correcting Jonah about Hamilton not being president
jokes.punchline: Jonah's logic that only presidents get musicals
jokes.explanation: Perfect Jonah logic failure - reasonable assumption taken to absurd conclusion.

jokes.text: No, he was our first Puerto Rican president.
jokes.punchline: Completely wrong on multiple levels
jokes.explanation: Shows Jonah's complete historical ignorance and racial confusion.

jokes.text: I am the white Hamilton of the Jeffersons.
jokes.setup: Trying to make sense of his Hamilton confusion
jokes.punchline: Nonsensical comparison mixing historical figures and TV shows
jokes.explanation: Brilliant absurdist moment showing Jonah's brain completely misfiring.

jokes.text: I designed it myself. I call it Yoloha. It's a combination of YOLO and aloha.
jokes.punchline: Terrible portmanteau combining internet slang and Hawaiian greeting
jokes.explanation: Perfect example of trying-too-hard creativity resulting in something awful.

jokes.text: Well, Buzzy, I think it's rad. ... Which is a combination of retarded and sad.
jokes.setup: Dan seems to compliment Buzzy's tie
jokes.punchline: Reveals he's creating his own insulting portmanteau
jokes.explanation: Exceptional misdirection and wordplay - sets up fake compliment then delivers devastating linguistic burn.

jokes.text: Honestly, if you fucked in front of us, it'd be more dignified.
jokes.setup: Dan and Jane's awkward workplace dynamic
jokes.punchline: Their public denial is worse than actual public sex
jokes.explanation: Sharp observation about how their denial creates more awkwardness than the truth would.

jokes.text: Ah, like gorillas at the zoo.
jokes.punchline: Comparing them to zoo animals
jokes.explanation: Simple but effective escalation of the zoo metaphor.

jokes.text: Jane just thinks the cold makes her and Brie's nipples pop more, and she's not wrong.
jokes.punchline: Revealing Jane's calculated sexual strategy
jokes.explanation: Uncomfortable workplace sexual manipulation delivered matter-of-factly.

jokes.text: Is it something that you eat or is it something you already ate?
jokes.punchline: Can't tell if it's food or waste
jokes.explanation: Classic Selina cultural insensitivity disguised as polite curiosity.

jokes.text: A beautiful Western woman helping out world sufferers in a stunning Gucci scarf.
jokes.punchline: Focusing on her expensive accessory while talking about suffering
jokes.explanation: Perfect satire of privilege tourism - mixing humanitarian rhetoric with fashion focus.

jokes.text: It's sort of like a 'Vogue' shoot.
jokes.punchline: Treating humanitarian mission like fashion photography
jokes.explanation: Perfectly captures Selina's inability to separate humanitarian work from personal branding.

jokes.text: We are surrounded by land mines. You're just like Princess Di.
jokes.punchline: Comparing to Princess Diana's landmine activism (and death)
jokes.explanation: Brilliant dark humor connecting real danger to celebrity tragedy while flattering Selina.

jokes.text: But with a better nose, of course.
jokes.punchline: Can't help but add petty physical comparison
jokes.explanation: Perfect Gary moment - can't give pure compliment without adding competitive element.

jokes.text: Hey, did you get your curds, Little Miss Muffless?
jokes.setup: Kent missed the cheese curds distribution
jokes.punchline: Plays on 'Little Miss Muffet' nursery rhyme
jokes.explanation: Clever wordplay showing Furlong's folksy-aggressive personality.

jokes.text: I go poo-poo in my panty-wanties.
jokes.setup: Asked what happens when he eats cheese
jokes.punchline: Infantile response about lactose intolerance
jokes.explanation: Pure humiliation comedy showing Will's childlike subjugation.

jokes.text: Put Wisconsin at the top of my shit list. ... Make them 1A and 1B.
jokes.setup: Being told to bump Sammy Hagar from enemies list
jokes.punchline: Making room by creating subcategories for top enemies
jokes.explanation: Shows Furlong's petty organizational approach to grudges.

jokes.text: All right, I need you and your buddies from the Island of Misfit Toys... Isle.
jokes.punchline: Kent's pedantic correction
jokes.explanation: Perfect character interaction - Furlong's insult met with Kent's automatic precision.

jokes.text: Oh, no, it understands.
jokes.setup: Jonah asking if Furlong needs something from him
jokes.punchline: Treating Jonah like a non-human entity
jokes.explanation: Brilliant dehumanization delivered with perfect timing and cruelty.

jokes.text: Whoa, what's this, the fourth horseface of the Apocalypse?
jokes.punchline: Biblical reference combined with appearance insult
jokes.explanation: Excellent blend of biblical knowledge and creative insult crafting.

jokes.text: Jesus, Jonah, if you're gonna pay for sex, just add the extra two bucks for the premium edition.
jokes.punchline: Suggests upgrading from current prostitute
jokes.explanation: Brutal insult treating relationship as commercial transaction.

jokes.text: There's a ring on hold at Tiffany's. Pick it up by 6:00. It's already paid for.
jokes.punchline: Casual logistics of buying engagement ring
jokes.explanation: Brilliant absurdist moment showing transactional nature of their 'relationship'.

jokes.text: This goat has an ear infection.
jokes.punchline: The security perimeter is marked by a sick farm animal
jokes.explanation: Absurd detail that grounds the poverty and chaos of the situation

jokes.text: You look like an old Dyke in an English gardening show.
jokes.punchline: Very specific visual comparison
jokes.explanation: Oddly specific and vivid insult that perfectly captures both visual and cultural stereotype.

jokes.text: We have no water here.
jokes.setup: Selina gives peace lily that needs watering twice daily
jokes.punchline: Pointing out the obvious problem with the gift
jokes.explanation: Perfect deadpan highlighting the absurdity of Western aid that ignores basic realities.

jokes.text: Oh. Oh, well, that's fine. We can just put it with the recycling. ... That is my bed.
jokes.setup: Selina suggests putting plant with recycling
jokes.punchline: What she's pointing to is actually Nyaring's bed
jokes.explanation: Excellent setup/payoff showing cultural disconnect and poverty tourism ignorance.

jokes.text: She's kind of a bitch.
jokes.punchline: Selina completely missing the point
jokes.explanation: Perfect Selina reaction - treating legitimate criticism as personal attack.

jokes.text: I made them from my husband's death shroud.
jokes.punchline: Revealing their morbid origin
jokes.explanation: Brilliantly dark humor that transforms innocent compliment into uncomfortable revelation.

jokes.text: No, it was a purposeful desecration of the man who beat and raped me.
jokes.setup: Gary calling it a touching tribute
jokes.punchline: Revealing it's actually revenge
jokes.explanation: Masterful escalation that transforms Western romanticization into harsh reality.

jokes.text: Well, they go with everything.
jokes.setup: Learning curtains are made from abusive husband's death shroud
jokes.punchline: Selina focuses on home decorating
jokes.explanation: Perfect Selina moment - treating trauma revelation as interior design advice.

jokes.text: You know that little animal that Nathan Lane plays in 'The Lion King'? ... Uh, so, three of those got caught in the engine.
jokes.punchline: Three meerkats in the engine
jokes.explanation: Gary's roundabout way of explaining a simple problem through pop culture references.

jokes.text: A beautiful woman lost in the desert with only a small group of complete incompetents to assist her? ... I've never seen anything quite like it, frankly. How do you do it?
jokes.punchline: Selina agreeing her staff is incompetent
jokes.explanation: Shows Selina's willingness to throw her team under the bus for validation.

jokes.text: Well, I remembered you Qataris are very wet-fingered.
jokes.punchline: Sexual double entendre
jokes.explanation: Crude sexual reference showing Selina's inappropriate flirtation.

jokes.text: You microdicked weasel, you couldn't even fill my pisshole.
jokes.punchline: Jane's aggressive sexual insult
jokes.explanation: Demonstrates Jane's sexual aggression and complete lack of workplace boundaries.

jokes.text: Let me advise you that I built this goddamn network with my own two tits!
jokes.setup: HR person trying to control the situation
jokes.punchline: Jane's crude assertion of her value
jokes.explanation: Powerful escalation showing Jane's complete rejection of corporate authority with memorable phrasing.

jokes.text: Any department store that wasn't started by Jews. I will have to start one myself.
jokes.punchline: Anti-Semitic qualifier followed by logical conclusion
jokes.explanation: Shows Selina's casual bigotry and her logical follow-through on problematic premises.

jokes.text: You look like the business end of a baboon.
jokes.punchline: Comparing him to baboon's rear end
jokes.explanation: Vivid and creative insult with good visual imagery.

jokes.text: When I talk, I can hear my skin crunch. Makes me wanna eat cereal.
jokes.punchline: Associating skin sound with breakfast cereal
jokes.explanation: Creative and specific description that creates vivid sensory imagery.

jokes.text: my political career had answered a craigslist ad for a modeling shoot in the Angeles National Forest.
jokes.punchline: Selina's metaphor comparing her dead career to murder victim
jokes.explanation: Brilliant extended metaphor comparing political death to actual murder. Highly original and quotable.

jokes.text: Those Sphinx-fuckers really love them some Chinese takeout.
jokes.punchline: Crude nickname and casual food metaphor for international relations
jokes.explanation: Typical Ben crudeness mixed with realpolitik observation.

jokes.text: this deal is Mao Ze-done, baby.
jokes.punchline: Pun on Mao Zedong's name
jokes.explanation: Solid pun combining political knowledge with Ben's style.

jokes.text: But unless you're planning on knitting your semiconductors out of bamboo shoots and panda cock, you're gonna need every ounce of gallium you can get in Sudan.
jokes.punchline: Absurd manufacturing metaphor with sexual element
jokes.explanation: Creative escalation combining trade knowledge with absurdist imagery and crude humor.

jokes.text: Rots of ruck with that.
jokes.punchline: Mocking Asian accent stereotype
jokes.explanation: Crude racial stereotype humor that's more cringe than clever, though in character for Selina.

jokes.text: Confucius say fuck, yeah!
jokes.punchline: Mixing ancient philosophy with modern profanity
jokes.explanation: Continues the casual racism theme but with more energy and celebration.

jokes.text: I don't want this whole evening to go all Natalie Wood on me.
jokes.setup: Being offered drugs on a yacht
jokes.punchline: Reference to actress who drowned
jokes.explanation: Dark celebrity reference that perfectly captures Selina's Hollywood knowledge and morbid humor.

jokes.text: Mohammad H. Christ, that's my dissident.
jokes.setup: Seeing her planned photo op stolen
jokes.punchline: Mixing Islamic and Christian religious references
jokes.explanation: Clever religious mashup showing Selina's cultural confusion and possessive attitude.

jokes.text: what Titty Gonzalez was too chicken-shit to say.
jokes.punchline: Crude nickname for the president
jokes.explanation: Typical Selina crudeness and petty rivalry with current president.

jokes.text: Let's stone the raper!
jokes.punchline: Enthusiastic support for violent justice
jokes.explanation: Shows Selina's shallow understanding of justice and tendency toward extremes.

jokes.text: You're gonna wanna take it to a church and marry it, Rog.
jokes.punchline: Will's coached hyperbolic response
jokes.explanation: Shows Will's trained enthusiasm and Furlong's need for constant validation.

jokes.text: And I want Rihanna to put a gun to my head while she makes me eat her out, but guess what, that's about as likely to happen as Will's wife putting a baby in her polyp festival of a uterus!
jokes.punchline: Furlong's crude sexual fantasy compared to Will's fertility issues
jokes.explanation: Peak Furlong vulgarity combining celebrity fantasy with devastating personal attack on Will.

jokes.text: I would sooner gouge out your eye and fuck your skull from here to the end of time.
jokes.setup: Threatening Jonah about the airport bill
jokes.punchline: Extremely graphic threat of violence
jokes.explanation: Furlong's creative and extremely violent threat showing his complete lack of boundaries.

jokes.text: You look like the world's least-fucked geisha.
jokes.punchline: Comparing his appearance to sexually unsuccessful geisha
jokes.explanation: Creative visual insult mixing cultural references with sexual inadequacy theme.

jokes.text: There has been one death.
jokes.setup: Explaining problems with the flower gifts
jokes.punchline: Casual mention of death from humanitarian gesture
jokes.explanation: Perfect deadpan delivery showing how Western aid gestures can have deadly consequences.

jokes.text: Oh, she was married to the village elder. ... Saturday.
jokes.setup: Selina asking about the young tea server
jokes.punchline: Revealing child marriage happened recently
jokes.explanation: Devastating revelation delivered with matter-of-fact timing that highlights cultural horror.

jokes.text: Well, please send along my congratulations.
jokes.punchline: Treating it as normal wedding news
jokes.explanation: Perfect Selina response - completely missing the horror and responding with social convention.

jokes.text: You look like redheaded bacon.
jokes.setup: Seeing Mike's sunburn from wrong sunscreen
jokes.punchline: Specific food comparison
jokes.explanation: Richard's simple but vivid visual description of Mike's condition.

jokes.text: NuvaRing is gonna dig this a lot. ... It's Nyaring.
jokes.punchline: Confusing it with birth control device
jokes.explanation: Classic Richard malapropism mixing serious political figure with contraceptive brand.

jokes.text: who are we to judge? Don't we... in the United States, we practice male circumcision on boys as young as tiny babies.
jokes.setup: Addressing female genital mutilation in speech
jokes.punchline: Creating false equivalency with male circumcision
jokes.explanation: Devastating political compromise showing Selina equating horrific practices to maintain her deal.

jokes.text: And female circumcision... I'm sure you have your reasons.
jokes.punchline: Completely abandoning moral stance
jokes.explanation: Peak moral compromise - Selina completely capitulating on human rights for political expediency.

jokes.text: Could you tell the Colossus of Chodes that this is the exact same goddamn office, only three floors down with a shittier view?
jokes.punchline: Kent revealing it's essentially the same terrible office
jokes.explanation: 'Colossus of Chodes' is brilliant insulting nickname, and the deflation of Jonah's victory is perfect.

jokes.text: Second goddamn floor, I can't even commit suicide.
jokes.setup: Realizing the office is still low
jokes.punchline: Can't even kill himself properly from this height
jokes.explanation: Dark humor delivered with perfect Kent deadpan - even his suicide would be inadequate.

jokes.text: What do I have to do, pull out my clit and cut it off in front of everyone to get anything done in this world?
jokes.setup: Deal falling through despite her compromised speech
jokes.punchline: Crude reference to her own speech topic
jokes.explanation: Brilliant callback to earlier topic showing Selina's crude desperation and self-awareness.

jokes.text: You know, white. One of them.
jokes.setup: Selina asking what he means by 'someone like you'
jokes.punchline: Reversing the typical racial dynamic
jokes.explanation: Brilliant reversal showing Selina experiencing racism from the other side with perfect irony.

jokes.text: He also thought you might be Jewish.
jokes.punchline: Adding another prejudice concern
jokes.explanation: Continues the prejudice theme while giving Selina another identity concern to worry about.

tmdb_overview: Selina visits Qatar. In D.C., Jonah gets a dinner invite. Dan gets an unexpected visit from an HR rep. Catherine and Marjorie have big news.
insight: Qatar diplomatic crisis triggers 88 jokes in 45 minutes—Selina's scrambling peaks here.
